Cinco de Mayo 2026 is a celebration that is observed, yearly, on May 5. It is a day that commemorates the Mexican army's victory, on May 5, 1862, over France at the Battle of Puebla during the Franco-Mexican War (1861-1867). The history of Cinco de Mayo 2026 dates back to 1861 when the Benito Juárez became the president of Mexico. It should be noted that Cinco de Mayo 2026 is not the anniversary of the defeat and expulsion of the French forces by the Mexicans, which occurred in 1867 when the French withdrew from Mexico.
